title: How to View and Pay Your Bill
content: To view and pay your bill, log into your account and navigate to the Billing section. You can see itemized charges, due dates, and payment history. We accept credit cards, debit cards, and bank transfers. Payment is due by the 15th of each month.

title: Understanding Your Billing Statement
content: Your billing statement shows all charges for the billing period. Each line item includes the service, date, and amount. Additional fees may include taxes and processing fees. Contact support if you notice any discrepancies.

title: Disputing a Charge
content: If you believe a charge is incorrect, you can dispute it by contacting our billing department within 30 days. Provide your account number, the charge in question, and a brief explanation. We will investigate and respond within 5 business days.

title: Subscription Renewal Process
content: Your subscription automatically renews on the anniversary date. We'll send a reminder 7 days before renewal. You can disable auto-renewal in Settings. Payment failure will pause your account until resolved.

title: Double Charge Resolution
content: If you see a duplicate charge, contact billing immediately. We'll refund the duplicate within 3-5 business days. Include your order number and transaction IDs. Check your email for confirmation after submission.

title: Invoice Dispute Process
content: To dispute an invoice, provide your invoice number and detailed explanation of the issue. Our billing team reviews disputes within 48 hours. You can upload supporting documents through your account portal.

title: Resetting Your Password
content: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email, and we will send a reset link. The link expires in 1 hour. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder.

title: Troubleshooting Login Issues
content: If you cannot log in: 1) Check your credentials are correct 2) Clear browser cache 3) Try a different browser 4) Disable browser extensions 5) Ensure Caps Lock is off. If persists, contact support.

title: App Installation Guide
content: Our app is available on iOS and Android. Download from App Store or Play Store. Minimum requirements: iOS 14+ or Android 10+. Ensure you have 200MB free storage. Restart your device after installation.

title: App Crash Troubleshooting
content: If the app crashes, try these steps: 1) Force close and reopen the app 2) Restart your device 3) Clear app cache in settings 4) Reinstall the app 5) Ensure your OS is updated. Report recurring crashes with your device model.

title: API Error Resolution
content: API errors usually indicate temporary service issues. Wait 5 minutes and retry. Include error codes when contacting support. Check our status page for known outages. Rate limit errors require waiting before retrying.

title: Integration Setup Guide
content: Our API supports REST and GraphQL. Get your API keys from Settings > Developer. Webhooks require SSL. We provide SDKs for Python, Node.js, and Java. Documentation is at docs.company.com. Contact support for enterprise setup.

title: Return Policy Overview
content: Items can be returned within 30 days of purchase if unused and in original packaging. Defective items can be returned within 90 days. Start a return by going to Your Orders and selecting Return. We provide a prepaid shipping label.

title: How to Track Your Refund
content: Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after we receive your return. The amount will be credited to your original payment method. You can track refund status in your account under Refund History.

title: Exchange vs Refund Options
content: When returning an item, you can choose: 1) Full refund to original payment 2) Store credit with 10% bonus 3) Exchange for same item in different size/color. Exchanges ship within 3 business days.

title: Damaged Goods Policy
content: If your item arrived damaged, report it within 48 hours with photos. We'll ship a replacement immediately at no cost. Keep all packaging until the claim is resolved. Damaged items don't require return for refund.

title: Return Window Extension
content: The standard 30-day return window can be extended for special circumstances. Contact support before expiration to request an extension. Approved extensions add 15-30 days. Holiday purchases automatically get extended returns.

title: Tracking Your Order
content: To track your order, use the tracking number in your confirmation email. Updates occur every 24-48 hours. For international orders, allow extra time for customs. Contact us if tracking hasn't updated in 5 days.

title: Shipping Options and Times
content: Standard shipping: 5-7 business days ($5.99). Express: 2-3 business days ($12.99). Same-day delivery available in select areas ($24.99). Free shipping on orders over $100.

title: Delayed or Lost Packages
content: If your package is delayed more than 7 days past the estimated date, contact us. We will file a claim with the carrier. For lost packages, we will reship or refund within 3 business days after investigation.

title: International Shipping Guide
content: International orders take 10-21 business days. Customs fees are the responsibility of the receiver. We ship to 150+ countries. Some items may be restricted in your country. Check local regulations before ordering.

title: Tracking Number Guide
content: Tracking numbers activate within 24-48 hours of shipment. Use the carrier's website for precise location. Delivery attempts are recorded. If marked delivered but not received, wait 48 hours before reporting.

title: Managing Your Account
content: Update your profile in Account Settings. You can change your name, email, phone, and address. Email changes require verification. For security, some changes may require additional confirmation.

title: Subscription Management
content: Manage your subscription in Account Settings. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle. Pausing is available for up to 3 months.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
content: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) in Security Settings. We support authenticator apps and SMS. 2FA adds an extra layer of security to your account.

title: Account Recovery Process
content: If you can't access your account, use Account Recovery. Verify your identity with email or phone. We'll send a recovery link. For compromised accounts, contact support immediately for security freeze.

title: Account Security Best Practices
content: Protect your account: use a unique password, enable 2FA, review login history monthly, never share credentials. We never ask for your password via email or phone. Report suspicious activity immediately.

title: Contacting Customer Support
content: You can reach us via: Live chat (24/7), Email (support@company.com, response within 24h), Phone (1-800-123-4567, Mon-Fri 9am-6pm EST). For fastest response, use live chat.

title: Company Hours and Locations
content: Our offices are open Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm EST. We are closed on major holidays. Our headquarters is in New York City. Virtual support is available 24/7.

title: Product Features Overview
content: Our platform offers real-time analytics, automated workflows, team collaboration, custom integrations, and detailed reporting. Plans vary in features and user limits. Schedule a demo to see all capabilities.

title: Pricing Plans Explained
content: We offer three plans: Starter ($9/mo, 1 user), Professional ($29/mo, 5 users), Enterprise (custom pricing). All plans include basic support. Annual billing provides 20% discount. Student discounts available.

title: SLA Information
content: Our SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime. Support response times: Starter 24h, Professional 4h, Enterprise 1h. Credits apply for missed SLA targets. Detailed metrics are available in your dashboard.

title: API Rate Limits
content: API limits: Starter 1000/day, Professional 10000/day, Enterprise unlimited. Rate limits reset at midnight UTC. Exceeding limits returns 429 status. Contact sales for higher limits.
